description: The Bornean ferret-badger, also known as Everett's ferret-badger or the Kinabalu ferret-badger, is a small mustelid endemic to the island of Borneo. It is listed as Endangered on the IUCN Red List due to its restricted range and habitat loss.
fun_fact: They cleverly repurpose abandoned burrows created by other animals rather than digging their own, despite having strong claws.
